channel.title: Architecture-Components on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Architecture-Components on Make Things Happen

item.title: RxJava & LiveData combined error handling
item.description: Using RxJava with the architecture components from Google in the latest project that I was working on, it made me think how does error handling fit with the LiveData and can you keep the RxJava error handling which I find quite nice.
